records.title: Verified op-amp drive and stability choices
records.blocker: Existing op-amp record is placeholder-level and lacks output-drive, load, bandwidth, and stability evidence for headphone or power-amplifier front ends.
evidence_needed: datasheet-backed output current and load limits

records.title: Class A/Class AB output devices
records.blocker: No verified BJT or MOSFET output-device records with SOA, current, dissipation, pinmap, and footprint evidence.

records.title: Class AB bias network
records.blocker: No reusable diode or Vbe-multiplier bias block exists with temperature, quiescent-current, and adjustment evidence.

records.title: Headphone DC blocking and output protection
records.blocker: Amplifier fixtures only document placeholder protection; they do not realize verified DC blocking, load safety, or output fault protection.

records.title: Thermal and high-current layout constraints
records.blocker: Layout rules exist as evidence hooks but are not proven on amplifier output stages with real KiCad DRC-clean boards.
evidence_needed: KiCad DRC artifact with semantic hash or git object ID

records.title: Feedback, decoupling, and stability layout
records.blocker: Op-amp feedback and decoupling evidence exists in tests, but broader analog stability placement and routing constraints are not promoted.

records.title: KiCad-backed amplifier promotion
records.blocker: Amplifier KiCad-backed fixture is expected_fail and blocks before fabrication-candidate evidence.

records.title: Amplifier design limits for AI generation
records.blocker: AI-facing amplifier limits are scattered across specs, examples, and README notes.
